issueFoundDetails: Version increment logic is vulnerable to race conditions in concurrent save operations, potentially leading to version conflicts or lost updates
The commitTick method does not validate that nextState.version matches the expected incremented version, allowing potential version inconsistencies
The OCC check in saveGame uses the state.version directly instead of the stored version, which can cause false positives in concurrency detection

Inconsistent handling of death transition logic. The death transition is only triggered when dungeonToEndPhase is true AND hasDeathSignal is true, but the actual death check happens after the view is updated, potentially causing UI inconsistencies.

Mixed responsibility in startAutoWalk function. It handles both path setting and enemy ID collection, which should be separated for better testability and maintainability.
Error message in sendCommand is hardcoded. The error message 'Game session expired. Please start a new game.' is not dynamic and could be improved for better user experience.
